profile_backing.source: Created and claimed after frankenjax-p1vbf.49 rejected the GEMM two-panel microkernel. The fresh fmd linalg profile still showed QR1024 as a top non-GEMM fj-lax row and GEMM had an active micro-lever rejection streak.

lever.description: Replace real-QR per-reflector Vec<Vec<f64>> storage and per-step reflector allocation with one packed reflector arena plus one reusable scratch vector.
lever.alien_primitive: arena/slab reuse for dense numerical kernel temporary storage
lever.not_in_scope: No blocked-WY QR, no tile-width change, no Householder arithmetic change, no dtype/fallback behavior change, no sign/phase policy change.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf50-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/qr_1024x1024_f64 --quick --noplot

candidate.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf50-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/qr_1024x1024_f64 --quick --noplot

isomorphism.ordering: Reflector generation order, R update order, tau storage order, Q identity initialization, Q reverse-pass order, R extraction order, and diagonal sign normalization are unchanged.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: QR has no comparison or tie-breaking surface in this real path.
isomorphism.floating_point: Each reflector copies the same column slice, computes norm_v, v0_abs, sign, v[0], v_norm_sq, tau, dot products, and element updates in the same order as before. The packed arena changes only reflector storage layout and allocation frequency; it does not reassociate arithmetic or request fused operations.
isomorphism.rng: No RNG is present in Primitive::Qr.

validation: RCH fmd cargo test -p fj-lax --lib qr -- --nocapture: 26 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored
RCH fmd cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets: passed
RCH fmd cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings: passed
rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs: nonzero due pre-existing unrelated file-wide formatting drift outside this hunk
ubs staged files: nonzero due pre-existing file-wide linalg.rs panic/unwrap/direct-index inventories; UBS embedded fmt/clippy/check/test subchecks clean

next_route.action: Reprofile fj-lax after landing this keep because the QR allocation bottleneck shifted.
candidate_primitives: blocked/recursive QR under an explicit floating-point parity contract
LU layout-copy removal or Schur update restructuring
GEMM caller output-write avoidance with full-profile confirmation
next_route.target_ratio: >= 1.10x for the next kept algorithmic lever
